scenarios.name: Ticket status lookup
scenarios.description: Normal employee checking an incident ticket
turns: Hi, can you check the status of ticket INC-48291?
Thanks! When was it last updated?

scenarios.name: VPN troubleshooting
scenarios.description: Employee needs help reconnecting to corporate VPN
turns: My VPN keeps disconnecting after the latest macOS update.
I already tried restarting — what else should I check?
